summary: Coach Onboarding Checklist V1 - Comprehensive Testing Complete. Backend: 15/15 tests passed (100%). Frontend: All core features verified. Checklist correctly shows for coaches, hidden for directors. Auto-complete, step tracking, navigation, and dismiss all working.
critical_code_review_comments: OnboardingChecklist component has proper data-testid attributes for all interactive elements
Auto-complete of mission_control step works on first checklist render via useEffect
Support Pod page tracks both meet_roster and support_pod steps on visit
Events page correctly tracks events step completion
Dismiss functionality properly updates user onboarding state in DB
Director role correctly returns show_checklist: false
All 5 step keys validated: mission_control, meet_roster, support_pod, events, log_activity
Progress bar and completion count update correctly as steps are completed
seed_data_creation: Reset Coach Garcia and Coach Williams onboarding state for fresh testing
context_for_next_testing_agent: Coach Onboarding Checklist feature fully verified. Onboarding state stored in users.onboarding field. 5 valid step keys: mission_control, meet_roster, support_pod, events, log_activity. Endpoints: GET /api/onboarding/status (returns show_checklist + steps for coaches), POST /api/onboarding/complete-step (body: {step: key}), POST /api/onboarding/dismiss. Auto-detection of log_activity from notes/actions/event_notes collections. Personalization: no athletes assigned shows 'Awaiting athlete assignments' with disabled:true on meet_roster step.

backend_endpoints: GET /api/onboarding/status - returns show_checklist: true with steps array for coaches ✓
GET /api/onboarding/status - returns show_checklist: false for directors ✓
POST /api/onboarding/complete-step - marks step complete with valid key ✓
POST /api/onboarding/complete-step - returns 400 for invalid step key ✓
Director forbidden (403) on complete-step and dismiss ✓
frontend_components: OnboardingChecklist renders on Mission Control for coaches ✓
Checklist does NOT render for directors ✓
Collapsed state shows 'Getting Started' with progress count ✓
Mini progress bar visible in collapsed state ✓
Expanded state shows all 5 steps with completion indicators ✓
Explore Mission Control auto-completes on first render ✓
'Take me to the next step' button present and navigates ✓
Visiting Support Pod completes meet_roster + support_pod steps ✓
Visiting Events page completes events step ✓
